commands.repair_reason: The remaining blockers are maintainer proxy/security-policy acceptance and current-head contributor proof, not a narrow automated code repair.; Needs attention: Needs attention because the diff intentionally adds a guarded direct transport path around the managed forward proxy for loopback Ollama embeddings. (sha=1b16cca33dcc68d9d39ffc832b14172cdb4a80cb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled-Ollama guarded fetch path so exact configured loopback memory embedding requests can bypass the managed proxy, with private SDK alias handling, docs, and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection. Current main sends Ollama memory embeddings through strict guarded fetch, and strict guarded fetch uses the managed EnvHttpProxyAgent whenever managed proxy mode is active.
commands.review_followup: The remaining blockers are maintainer proxy/security-policy acceptance and current-head contributor proof, not a narrow automated code repair.
